title: C schnorr48 canonical-vector test not wired into CI
description: lichen/tests/schnorr48/ (canonical-vector C test) is host-only CMake with no testcase.yaml and no CI wiring; twister runs only tests/link_crypto, which contains zero canonical vectors. The C-side test-vector guarantee depends on someone manually building it. Fix: add testcase.yaml / wire into CI. VERIFY: check whether origin/main .github/workflows executes tests/schnorr48.
